content:
Supporting open source goes way beyond contributing code and money!
We all use open source. Directly or indirectly.
Your Android phone ?
Your Chrome or Firefox browser?
Your favourite VLC video player ?
Wikipedia?
It’s all open source.
You and I use the web daily. And the vast majority of it is built on top of the open source.
So we have a lot to be grateful for.
Thousands of volunteers made it possible.
There’s a beautifully thriving open source world out there already. Now imagine if more people contributed — wouldn’t it be great?
And if you’re thinking: “I don’t know how to code” — stop!
It’s not the only way!
Contributing to open source doesn’t end with writing code or donating money. These are the obvious ways, but not the only ones!
There are plenty of ways to help and they are suited for people with all skills.
